name: Bahamas
avoid: June–November is hurricane season, with the highest risk of flight disruptions, rough seas, and closed water activities.
Christmas, New Year, and US spring-break weeks make Nassau and Paradise Island noticeably pricier than the Out Islands.
Inter-island ferries and small-aircraft schedules thin out on some Sundays and can shift quickly in windy weather, so do not leave transfers to the last minute.
stopoverNote: For trips under 6 days, most travelers should stay on New Providence (Nassau + Paradise Island) and add only one Out Island such as Eleuthera or Exuma.

cities.name: Nassau
cities.notes: Historic arrival hub on New Providence for forts, museums, Fish Fry dinners, and easy jitney access to beaches and downtown sights.

cities.name: Paradise Island
cities.notes: Best for Atlantis, Aquaventure, Cabbage Beach, and a polished resort day only minutes from downtown Nassau by water taxi or bridge.

cities.name: Eleuthera
cities.notes: Long pink-sand island best known for Glass Window Bridge, Queen's Bath, Governor's Harbour beaches, and blue-hole excursions.

cities.name: Exuma
cities.notes: George Town and Great Exuma are the practical base for Pig Beach tours, Thunderball Grotto, Stocking Island, and clear-water sandbars.

cities.name: Grand Bahama
cities.notes: Freeport and Port Lucaya combine caves, national-park boardwalks, easier hotel pricing, and a straightforward flight finish from Grand Bahama International.

itinerary.sim: ALIV is the easiest prepaid pickup on arrival and usually the strongest bet across Nassau, Paradise Island, Exuma, and Freeport; budget roughly ₹1,000–₹3,800 for a short-stay SIM or weekly data pack, with BTC as the backup option.

Nassau.name: Nassau
Nassau.note: Use Nassau as your arrival buffer and cultural day; jitneys are cheapest inside town, but taxis are still the practical airport transfer after dark.

days.theme: Queen's Staircase, Downtown Museums and Fish Fry Night

activities.name: Queen's Staircase and Fort Fincastle
activities.cost: Queen's Staircase free; Fort Fincastle about ₹840 pp
activities.tip: Go before 10 AM if cruise ships are in port so the staircase waterfall corner is quieter.

activities.name: National Art Gallery of The Bahamas
Arawak Cay Fish Fry dinner run by jitney

days.theme: Flamingos, Forts and a Relaxed Cable Beach Finish

activities.name: Junkanoo Beach or Cable Beach swim block

Paradise Island.name: Paradise Island
Paradise Island.note: Paradise Island works best as a single full resort-and-beach day unless you are staying on-site at Atlantis for multiple park sessions.

days.theme: Atlantis Aquaventure, Cabbage Beach and Harbor Views

activities.name: Nassau to Paradise Island water taxi
Atlantis Aquaventure day pass
activities.tip: Book ahead for December–April because capacity caps are common and walk-up availability is unreliable.

Eleuthera.name: Eleuthera
Eleuthera.note: Base around Governor's Harbour if you want easier food choices, or around Gregory Town/North Eleuthera if Sapphire Blue Hole and Harbour Island are the priority.

days.theme: Glass Window Bridge, Queen's Bath and Pink-Sand Driving Day

activities.name: Queen's Bath tidal pools
activities.tip: Only go in calm sea conditions; waves can make the rocks dangerous at high surf.

activities.name: French Leave Beach or Twin Coves swim stop
Harbour Island side trip by water taxi from North Eleuthera

days.theme: Sapphire Blue Hole and Cave Adventure

activities.name: Blue Hole and Cathedral Cave guided tour with Eleuthera Outdoor Center
activities.tip: This is the simplest way to visit the blue hole safely if you do not want to self-drive rough access roads.

hotels.name: The Sunset Cove and Rainbow Room

Exuma.name: Exuma
Exuma.note: George Town is the most practical base if you want to keep Pig Beach, Stocking Island and beach time all within easy reach without paying luxury-cay rates.

days.theme: Swimming Pigs, Thunderball Grotto and Sandbar Day

activities.name: Half-day Exuma Swimming Pigs tour from Great Exuma
activities.tip: Shared tours usually include Pig Beach plus one or two snorkel or iguana stops, and seats sell out fast in high season.

activities.name: Thunderball Grotto snorkel stop
activities.cost: Usually bundled with boat tour or ₹4,200–₹8,400 pp as a separate small-group outing

activities.name: George Town waterfront conch snack stop

days.theme: Stocking Island, Tropic of Cancer Beach and a Slow Blue-Water Finish

activities.name: Tropic of Cancer Beach drive and swim
Moriah Harbour Cay National Park sandbar outing

Grand Bahama.name: Grand Bahama
Grand Bahama.note: Grand Bahama is the easiest Out Island to end on if you want gentler hotel pricing, cave walks and a direct flight finish from Freeport.

days.theme: Lucayan National Park, Gold Rock Beach and Port Lucaya

activities.name: Gold Rock Beach boardwalk and low-tide beach time
activities.cost: Included with Lucayan National Park entry

activities.name: Ben's Cave and mangrove trail
activities.cost: Included with Lucayan National Park entry

days.theme: Garden Walks, Reef Time and a Low-Key Freeport Day

activities.name: Taino Beach or Smith's Point beach break
Peterson Cay National Park snorkel or glass-bottom boat

connections.method: Taxi or pre-booked hotel shuttle is the normal arrival move; jitneys do not directly serve the airport well for first-time visitors with luggage.
Public water taxi from Prince George Wharf is the scenic budget option; taxis over the bridge are faster late evening.
Water taxi back to Nassau, then Bahamas Ferries to Spanish Wells or Harbour Island, plus a short taxi or water-taxi hop onward to your Eleuthera base.
Bahamasair via Nassau is the most practical public connection between Eleuthera and George Town on Great Exuma.
Bahamasair via Nassau is the realistic same-day public routing; private charters are much faster but far more expensive.

extras: The Bahamian dollar is pegged 1:1 with the US dollar, so USD cash works widely and the INR math stays simple at roughly ₹84 per BSD/USD.
Indian passport holders usually need a Bahamas visa unless they also hold a valid US, UK, Canada, or Schengen visa or residency document, so check the official eVisa rules before booking flights.
Jitneys are cash-only and cheap on New Providence, but they do not cover every tourist route after dark and are uncommon on the Out Islands.
If you are combining ferries with flights, keep at least half a day of buffer because wind and swell can shift boat timings with short notice.
Atlantis, Pig Beach tours, and the best-value Exuma and Eleuthera hotels all book up early for December–April, so this country rewards advance planning more than last-minute improvisation.
